title: bromus madritensis var. maximus
intro: Bromus madritensis var. maximus, also known as the Spanish broom or Spanish brome, is a perennial grass species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and is valued for its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. The health benefits of Bromus madritensis var. maximus are attributed to its richness in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and diabetes. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote cardiovascular health and reduce stress.
